response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang background, but the role requires native Japanese proficiency (not listed), strong C for UNIX embedded development (only a brief stint at NI over a decade ago), and Linux kernel modification experience plus networking security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3) — none of which appear in the resume. The mismatch on hard requirements is severe.
strengths: Senior-level engineer with 13+ years of professional software development experience
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Linux familiarity and DevOps/infrastructure exposure (Docker, CI, Kubernetes)
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement is native-level Japanese
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) experience
No Linux kernel source-code modification experience and only minimal recent C work
